queries.question: List all print media publications and also list online media publications with an audience size of 100,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Publications.Name 
FROM DistributionPlatforms JOIN PublishesIn ON DistributionPlatforms.PlatformID = PublishesIn.PlatformID JOIN Publications ON Publications.PublicationID = PublishesIn.PublicationID
WHERE DistributionPlatforms.Type = "Print Media" OR DistributionPlatforms.Type = "Online Media" AND PublishesIn.AudienceSize = 100000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?distributionplatforms a :DistributionPlatforms .
  ?publishesin a :PublishesIn .
  ?publishesin p:hasDistributionPlatforms ?distributionplatforms .
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publishesin p:hasPublications ?publications .
  ?publications p:name ?name .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?publishesin p:AudienceSize ?audiencesize_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Print Media" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Online Media" && (STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000" || STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000.0"))))
}

queries.question: What print media publications have an audience size of 100,000 and what online media publications have the same audience size?
queries.sql:
SELECT Publications.Name 
FROM DistributionPlatforms JOIN PublishesIn ON DistributionPlatforms.PlatformID = PublishesIn.PlatformID JOIN Publications ON Publications.PublicationID = PublishesIn.PublicationID
WHERE (DistributionPlatforms.Type = "Print Media" OR DistributionPlatforms.Type = "Online Media") AND PublishesIn.AudienceSize = 100000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?distributionplatforms a :DistributionPlatforms .
  ?publishesin a :PublishesIn .
  ?publishesin p:hasDistributionPlatforms ?distributionplatforms .
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publishesin p:hasPublications ?publications .
  ?publications p:name ?name .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?publishesin p:AudienceSize ?audiencesize_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Print Media" || STR(?type_w2) = "Online Media")) && (STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000" || STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me publications in print media and online media with an audience size of 100,000.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?distributionplatforms a :DistributionPlatforms .
  ?publishesin a :PublishesIn .
  ?publishesin p:hasDistributionPlatforms ?distributionplatforms .
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publishesin p:hasPublications ?publications .
  ?publications p:name ?name .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?publishesin p:AudienceSize ?audiencesize_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Print Media" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Online Media" && (STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000" || STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000.0"))))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?distributionplatforms a :DistributionPlatforms .
  ?publishesin a :PublishesIn .
  ?publishesin p:hasDistributionPlatforms ?distributionplatforms .
  ?publications a :Publications .
  ?publishesin p:hasPublications ?publications .
  ?publications p:name ?name .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w .
  ?distributionplatforms p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?publishesin p:AudienceSize ?audiencesize_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Print Media" || STR(?type_w2) = "Online Media")) && (STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000" || STR(?audiencesize_w) = "100000.0")))
} }
}
